notes: Solid Tetris implementation with SRS kicks, hold, ghost piece, DAS/ARR, and level progression; minor issue with clearAnim timer not decrementing (clearAnimTimer stays static, so flash animation may not work correctly), but overall very playable and complete.
Excellent implementation with DAS/ARR, lock delay, and ghost piece, but uses 4x4 matrices for all pieces causing 3x3 pieces (T, S, Z, J, L) to wobble off-center during rotation.

A solid and mostly complete Tetris clone with hold/ghost/next/pause and reasonable visuals, but strict judging docks it for nonstandard line-clear timing/state handling, simplistic randomizer shuffle, and some control/gameplay edge cases that keep it from feeling fully polished.
